category_sources: source_facts.description identifies libplctag as an API for accessing Allen-Bradley PLC data over Ethernet.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and source_facts.homepage identify the project as libplctag.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub project; the official wiki contains API documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/libplctag/libplctag, so repo is null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names AB PLC data access over Ethernet; official README describes libplctag as a C library for PLC communication.
